Interface ISQLCheck3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase

ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that check a SQL statement.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("635FB839-C678-4385-8324-7DCC971378A4")]
public interface ISQLCheck3 : ISQLCheck2, ISQLCheck
